name: FunnelFox
description: No-code web-to-app funnel platform for subscription apps with unified web billing, pricing experiments and checkout optimization.

seo.title: FunnelFox — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: FunnelFox: No-code web-to-app funnel platform for subscription apps with unified web billing, pricing experiments and checkout optimization.

when_to_use: Web-to-app subscription funnel with unified web and IAP billing
Pricing experiment and checkout A/B testing for subscription app growth
No-code web paywall to capture subscribers who won't pay via App Store
Subscription conversion optimization from landing page to in-app activation

pros: No-code web-to-app funnels tuned for subscriptions
Unified billing reduces Apple tax on web-acquired users
cons: Web-to-app paths require ad and ASO maturity
Regulatory rules on linking off-app keep shifting
Another vendor in the subscription stack
Revenue share and pricing details vary
review.verdict: Clever web-to-app funnel layer for subscription apps optimizing for margin, if your UA strategy supports web entry.
review.best_for: Consumer subscription apps running paid UA to web landing pages.
review.not_for: Apps relying solely on App Store organic and IAP.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
